title: Christmas Bruschetta
ingredients: 1 can small artichoke hearts, drained and chopped
1/4 cup freshly grated parmesan cheese, plus more for topping
instructions: In a small bowl, blend softened butter and minced garlic.
Spread garlic butter on baguette slices.
Toast the buttered baguette slices under the broiler.
In a separate bowl, mix together the artichoke hearts, tomato, scallions, oregano, Greek seasoning, feta cheese, and 1/4 cup parmesan cheese.
Spoon the artichoke and feta mixture onto the toasted baguette slices.
Sprinkle additional parmesan cheese on top of each slice.
Broil until bubbly and lightly browned.
